docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-24-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BONHAM, CARLTON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG, RICHARD $3,990.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,080.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,000.00 FILED BY BONHAM, CARLTON AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, RICHARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-24-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BONHAM, CARLTON AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, RICHARD
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-18-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, RICHARD

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-24-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-24-2019 BY GREG GROENEVELD. PLAINTIFF CARLTON BONHAM IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RICHARD WONG IS PRESENT. EVAN DAHME, GEICO CLAIMS SUPERVISOR TESTIFIES ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, RICHARD
